source_pr.title: plan, executor: fix multi-update.
source_pr.body:
```sql
update T set a = 8, b = a
```
should set both a and b to `8`.

same for `insert T values (...) on duplicate key update a = 8, b = a`

symptoms: result := tk.MustQuery(`SELECT * FROM test_mu ORDER BY a`) (executor/executor_test.go)
